title: Clear Aligner Tray Visualization
basePrompt: Ultra-realistic premium dental product photo of clear aligner trays with anatomically correct smooth U-shaped curved dental arch form, realistic maxillary and mandibular curvature, symmetric tooth alignment arc, clean gumline-following trim, clinically accurate transparent polymer material, subtle condensation detail, realistic optical reflections, orthodontic clinic context, professional commercial healthcare campaign style

angleVariations.front: Single aligner tray centered on a sterile dental countertop with soft morning clinic light and subtle depth background.
angleVariations.three-quarter: Aligner tray placed beside dental scanner wand and case card on a treatment desk, three-quarter perspective.
angleVariations.side: Side profile of stacked upper and lower aligners near a blurred dental chair environment, emphasizing arch curve silhouette.
angleVariations.closeup: Macro detail on aligner edge trim and tooth contours with realistic micro-reflections and material transparency.
angleVariations.workflow: Orthodontist hand placing aligner on physical model at workstation with monitor in background, wider operational context.

title: Crowns and Bridges Precision Visual
basePrompt: Hyper-realistic dental lab macro photography of ceramic crowns and bridges on a neutral sterile clinical setup, anatomically accurate tooth morphology, natural enamel and ceramic translucency, realistic specular highlights, premium restorative dentistry brand campaign look

angleVariations.front: A full set of ceramic units arranged in a linear tray under neutral white lab lights with clean symmetry.
angleVariations.three-quarter: Three-quarter perspective of multi-unit bridge on a stone model with shallow depth and warm side lighting.
angleVariations.side: Side profile showing crown thickness and margin details on articulated model against softly blurred lab instruments.
angleVariations.closeup: Extreme macro showing ceramic translucency, occlusal grooves, and realistic glaze texture.
angleVariations.workflow: Lab technician checking crown fit under magnification lamp with digital caliper and tools in frame.

title: Digital Smile Planning Screen
basePrompt: Authentic orthodontic planning workstation in a real office setting: two laptops on a wooden desk showing dental arch and tooth setup screens, sticky notes on wall, natural room lighting, true-to-life perspective and textures, candid professional environment, clinically accurate dental planning visuals

angleVariations.front: Direct front-facing workstation shot with both laptop screens visible and planning UI clearly readable as dental context.
angleVariations.three-quarter: Three-quarter view with clinician hand using stylus on one laptop while second screen displays arch simulation.
angleVariations.side: Side angle showing monitor depth and desk setup with dental model and notes, realistic office environment.
angleVariations.closeup: Close-up of one display area with tooth movement staging timeline and realistic UI elements, no gibberish text.
angleVariations.workflow: Wide scene including workstation, sticky notes, and accessories to communicate active digital case planning workflow.

title: Dental Lab Workflow Scene
basePrompt: Photorealistic modern digital dental laboratory scene with clean minimal composition, one primary subject equipment per frame, sterile organized workspace, natural clinical lighting, authentic technical realism, premium medical brand visual style

angleVariations.front: Focused front shot of a single CAD/CAM milling machine as hero subject, clean bench, minimal background clutter, no crowd of people.
angleVariations.three-quarter: Three-quarter view focused on one desktop dental scanner with a single model being scanned, simple surrounding setup.
angleVariations.side: Side angle focused on one 3D dental printer and printed model tray, sparse environment and clear negative space.
angleVariations.closeup: Close-up focused on one precision finishing micromotor handpiece and dental model contact point, macro technical detail.
angleVariations.workflow: Focused workstation scene with one monitor showing CAD design and one technician only, uncluttered bench and minimal equipment.
